Actions.Text: COMMITTEE DISCHARGED AND COMMITTED TO RULES

Title: Authorizes Cong Kehal Square of Roman to receive retroactive real property tax exempt status
Summary: Authorizes the Cong Kehal Square of Roman to receive retroactive real property tax exempt status for the 2024 assessment roll and all of the 2023-2024 school taxes.
ActClause: AN ACT authorizing the Cong Kehal Square of Roman to receive retroactive real property tax exempt status
